mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in declining rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 5.0%, labor market tightness accelerates wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 5-day horizon.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns are negative or flat in >60% of instances where UNRATE crosses below 5.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising commercial and industrial credit availability (RSAFS) combined with stable industrial production (INDPRO) signals a healthy demand-supply balance, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Joint signal produces negative forward returns in >50% of observations, or the interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: In a high-inflation regime where CPIAUCSL exceeds 210, Federal Reserve rate hikes compress equity valuation multiples, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive or neutral during CPIAUCSL-driven rate hike episodes, or forward returns show no significant difference between high and low inflation regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in nonfarm payrolls indicates expanding corporate hiring and revenue, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth months are followed by negative SPX returns in >55% of cases over a 5-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts exceeding 1800 thousand annualized units signals robust residential demand and construction activity, lifting financials and materials sectors and driving positive 5-day forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns are negative in >60% of months where HOUST crosses above 1800.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production paired with declining unemployment indicates supply-side productivity gains outpacing labor constraints, generating positive 60-day forward equity returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term fails to predict forward returns, or SPX 60-day returns are negative in >50% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: When quarterly real GDP growth exceeds 2.0%, corporate earnings momentum accelerates, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
failure_condition: Forward returns are flat or negative in >55% of quarters where GDPC1 growth exceeds 2.0%, or rolling Rank IC remains below 0.02.
